title: Host creates a new live session from the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated host can create a fresh session and is taken to the host session view where a join code is visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Trigger hosting a new session from the dashboard
Verify the host lands in the live host session view for the newly created session
Verify a join code is visible on the host session view

title: Log in successfully and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies an existing host can log in with valid credentials and lands on the authenticated host dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Ensure the login tab is active
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed

title: Host can create a new live session from Settings and see a join code
description: Verifies an authenticated host can create a new session from the Settings modal and lands on the new host session view where a join code is visible.
category: Host Settings Modal — Create New Session

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Open the most recently created session from the host dashboard
Open Settings
Trigger creating a new session
Verify the host is on a new live session view and a join code is displayed

title: Create a new host account and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies a new host can sign up with valid details and is taken to the authenticated host dashboard on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch to the sign-up tab
Fill New Host in the display name field
Fill host+signup1@example.com in the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the sign-up form
Verify the authenticated host dashboard is displayed

title: Participant can join from landing modal using a valid 6-character code
description: Verifies a guest can enter a valid 6-character join code from the landing modal and reach the participant pre-join screen.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the join room modal
Fill a valid 6-character join code into the code field
Continue from the join modal
Verify the participant pre-join screen is displayed for that code
Verify a display name input is shown on the pre-join screen

title: Host stops a live session and sees ended recap
description: Verifies a host can stop an active session from Settings and the host view transitions to an inline ended recap where stop controls are no longer available.
category: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Open Settings in the host session view
Trigger Stop Session
Verify an inline ended session recap is displayed with participants and songs played sections
Verify the Stop Session control is no longer available

title: Complete pre-join by entering a display name and entering the live session
description: Verifies a guest can enter a display name on the pre-join screen and is taken into the participant live session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite URL into the join input
Continue to join
Fill in the display name field with Guest QA
Submit to enter the session
Verify the participant live session view is displayed

title: Join a room from landing modal using a full invite URL
description: Verifies a guest can paste a full invite URL in the landing Join Room modal and proceed to the participant pre-join screen for that code.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Wait for the host session view to finish loading
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite URL into the join input
Continue to join
Verify the participant pre-join screen is displayed for the joined code

title: Host session view renders live layout without mounting YouTube player on a fresh session
description: Verifies the host live session view shows the live layout (feed/queue/invite) and does not mount the YouTube player when nothing is playing.
category: Host Session View — Live Layout and Live Feed

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new host session from the dashboard
Verify the host live session layout is displayed including queue, live feed, and an invite panel
Verify the YouTube player is not displayed

title: Host sees creating state while a new session is being created
description: Verifies the dashboard shows a transient creating state when the host starts session creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Trigger hosting a new session from the dashboard
Verify the session creation control shows a creating-in-progress state
Verify the host lands in the live host session view for the newly created session

title: Add a track from search suggestions using keyboard navigation
description: Verifies a participant can add a track by navigating search suggestions with the keyboard and the queue updates with the new item.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite URL into the join input
Continue to join
Fill in the display name field with SearchGuest
Submit to enter the session
Fill a common search query into the Add to Queue input
Press ArrowDown
Press Enter
Verify the queue shows a newly added track item

title: Upvote a queued track and see vote count and ordering update
description: This test verifies a participant can upvote a queued track and the UI reflects the updated vote count and queue ordering in the session.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Wait for the host live session view to load
Copy the session join code from the host view
Open a new private/incognito browser context and navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join code into the join code field
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the session
In the participant session view, add a track using search suggestions selection
Toggle upvote on the queued track
Verify the queued track shows an increased vote count and the upvoted state is visually active
Verify the queue ordering updates to reflect the upvoted track’s higher priority

title: Host dashboard shows previous sessions list with statuses
description: Verifies an authenticated host can view the previous sessions list including live/ended status and participant counts.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Verify a previous sessions list is displayed
Verify at least one session entry shows a status indicator and a participant count

title: Logout returns to the auth gate
description: Verifies an authenticated host can log out and is returned to the login/sign-up screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Trigger the logout action
Verify the login and sign-up forms are displayed

title: Add a track by submitting a YouTube URL
description: Verifies a participant can submit a valid YouTube URL to add a track and the queue updates with the new item.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite URL into the join input
Continue to join
Fill in the display name field with YouTubeGuest
Submit to enter the session
Fill a valid YouTube video URL into the Add to Queue input
Submit add track
Verify the queue shows a newly added track item

title: Host cannot access stop controls after ending a session
description: Verifies that after stopping a session, the host cannot open Settings to find stop controls again and remains in the ended recap state.
category: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Open Settings in the host session view
Trigger Stop Session
Attempt to open Settings again from the ended session view
Verify the ended session recap remains displayed
Verify session stop controls are not reachable

title: Host can open an active session from the previous sessions list
description: Verifies a host can open a live/active session from the dashboard list and reach the host session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Wait for the previous sessions list to load
Open a session from the list that is marked as live/active
Verify the host lands in the live host session view for that session
Verify the live session queue area is displayed in the host view

title: Host sees stopping pending state when ending a session
description: Verifies that triggering Stop Session shows a pending stopping state before the ended recap renders.
category: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Open Settings in the host session view
Trigger Stop Session
Verify a stopping pending indicator is shown
Verify an inline ended session recap is displayed

title: Reject invalid host credentials with a toast
description: Verifies logging in with a wrong password shows an invalid-credentials toast and does not enter the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Ensure the login tab is active
Fill invalid.user@example.com in the email field
Fill wrong-password in the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials toast is displayed

title: Change display name successfully and see it reflected in header and People list
description: This test verifies a participant can change their display name during a session and the new name appears in the session header and People view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session join code from the host view
Open a new private/incognito browser context and navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join code into the join code field
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the session
Open the edit-name dialog from the participant session view
Replace the display name with "Guest Renamed"
Save the new display name
Open the People view in the participant session sidebar
Verify the participant header reflects the updated display name
Verify the People list shows the updated display name for the participant

title: Copy an invite link from Invite Friends modal and see state cycle then reset
description: This test verifies a participant can open the Invite Friends modal, copy the invite link, see a Copied confirmation, and then see it reset back to the initial state.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session join code from the host view
Open a new private/incognito browser context and navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join code into the join code field
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the session
Open the Invite Friends modal from the participant session sidebar
Click Copy Link in the invite modal
Wait for the copied confirmation state to appear
Wait for the copy button state to reset
Verify the invite modal remains open and shows the copy control in its reset state

title: Participant can view History empty state and see host badge in People list
description: Verifies a participant can switch between History and People views and sees an empty history state plus a host badge in the members list.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
Create a new host session from the dashboard
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite link into the join input
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the live session
Switch to the History view
Switch to the People view
Verify the People view shows a members list and the host is indicated with a host badge
Verify the History view shows an empty state indicating no songs have been played yet

title: Host can cancel out of Settings without ending the session
description: Verifies the host can open and dismiss the Settings modal and remain in the live host session view without transitioning to the ended recap.
category: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Open Settings in the host session view
Close the Settings modal
Verify the host live session view remains visible
Verify an ended session recap is not displayed

title: Show an error toast and do not add a queue item for an invalid track URL
description: Verifies submitting an invalid or unresolvable track URL shows an error toast and the queue does not gain a new item.
category: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session invite link from the invite panel
Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Paste the copied invite URL into the join input
Continue to join
Fill in the display name field with BadUrlGuest
Submit to enter the session
Record the current number of queue items
Fill an invalid track URL into the Add to Queue input
Submit add track
Verify an add-track error toast is displayed
Verify the number of queue items is unchanged

title: Reject whitespace-only display name edits with an error toast
description: This test verifies whitespace-only display name changes are rejected and an error toast is shown while the current name remains unchanged in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session join code from the host view
Open a new private/incognito browser context and navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join code into the join code field
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the session
Open the edit-name dialog from the participant session view
Replace the display name with whitespace-only text
Save the new display name
Verify an error toast about an invalid display name is visible
Verify the participant header still shows the previous display name

title: Prevent sign-up with required fields left empty
description: Verifies the sign-up form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows a validation indication.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch to the sign-up tab
Fill New Host in the display name field
Fill host+missingpassword@example.com in the email field
Submit the sign-up form
Verify a form validation error is displayed

title: Join modal shows session-not-found for a nonexistent valid code
description: Verifies the join room modal shows a not-found inline error when a well-formed 6-character code does not match a session.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the join room modal
Fill a valid 6-character join code that is expected to be nonexistent into the code field
Continue from the join modal
Verify an inline session-not-found error is displayed
Verify the user remains in the join room modal

title: Join modal rejects invalid or unparsable input
description: Verifies the join room modal prevents continuing with invalid input and shows the valid-URL validation message.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the join room modal
Fill an invalid join input into the code field
Continue from the join modal
Verify an inline validation error is displayed for the join input
Verify the user remains in the join room modal

title: Show session-not-found state on pre-join for an invalid code
description: Verifies the pre-join screen displays a session-not-found message when opened with an invalid join code.

steps.description: Navigate to /session/ZZZZZZ/join
Verify a session-not-found message is displayed for the code

title: Block login when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when email or password is missing and shows a validation indication.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Ensure the login tab is active
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the login form
Verify a form validation error is displayed

title: Host can retry loading the previous sessions list
description: Verifies the dashboard allows re-fetching the previous sessions list via a Retry control when the list fails to load.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host authentication form
If a list-load failure state is shown, click the retry control to reload the list
Verify the previous sessions list is displayed after retry
Verify session entries are visible in the list

title: Reject invalid invite URL input in Join Room modal
description: Verifies the Join Room modal shows an inline validation error when the pasted text is too long or does not contain a join code.
category: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill a non-parseable string longer than allowed into the join input
Continue to join
Verify an inline URL validation error is displayed

title: Close the Invite Friends modal via the close control
description: This test verifies a participant can close the Invite Friends modal and return to the session view.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the host login form
Start hosting a new session from the host dashboard
Copy the session join code from the host view
Open a new private/incognito browser context and navigate to /
Open the Join Room modal
Fill the join code into the join code field
Continue to the pre-join screen
Fill a valid display name into the display name field
Join the session
Open the Invite Friends modal from the participant session sidebar
Close the invite modal using the close control
Verify the invite modal is no longer visible
Verify the participant session view remains accessible

title: Switching between login and sign-up preserves correct form context
description: Verifies a user can switch between login and sign-up tabs and the appropriate form fields and submit action are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /host/auth
Switch to the sign-up tab
Switch to the login tab
Switch to the sign-up tab
Verify the sign-up form is displayed
